context: Verify that the agent correctly triages a session-lifecycle context tool from a GitHub URL, including scope assessment, complete reference summary, REVIEWED.md entry with scope-fit field, REFERENCE_INDEX.md update, and correct handling of vendoring and promotion decisions.

checklist.name: Duplicate check performed before any file is created
checklist.description: The agent searches REVIEWED.md and/or references/REFERENCE_INDEX.md for the repo URL or a matching slug before writing any new file.

checklist.name: Scope fit is assessed and documented
checklist.description: The agent explicitly assesses whether the tool is in scope, borderline, or out of scope for the research repo and documents the reasoning.

checklist.name: references/<slug>.md is created
checklist.description: A new file is created at references/<slug>.md (e.g. references/versatly-clawvault.md or references/clawvault.md).

checklist.name: Slug follows naming conventions
checklist.description: The slug is either <author-or-org>-<tool-name> or just the tool name for well-known tools.

checklist.name: TL;DR contains 3 to 8 bullets
checklist.description: The TL;DR section in the reference file has between 3 and 8 bullet points.

checklist.name: Architecture overview covers context-relevant sections
checklist.description: The architecture overview addresses injection mechanism, session lifecycle (wake/sleep/checkpoint), and any compression or eviction handling. Inapplicable sections are marked N/A.

checklist.name: Self-reported metrics marked as reported
checklist.description: Any benchmark numbers or performance claims from the README are marked '(as reported)'. No metric is stated as a verified fact.

checklist.name: REVIEWED.md scope-fit field is present
checklist.description: The detailed section in REVIEWED.md includes a scope-fit field showing 'in scope', 'borderline', or 'out of scope' with a brief reason.

checklist.name: REVIEWED.md summary table row and detailed section are added
checklist.description: A new row is added to the REVIEWED.md summary table and a detailed section is added with repo URL, author, version, language, tags, scope-fit, and disposition (pending).

checklist.name: REFERENCE_INDEX.md is updated
checklist.description: A new row is added to the appropriate category in references/REFERENCE_INDEX.md.

checklist.name: No git submodule add is executed automatically
checklist.description: The agent does not run git submodule add during triage. Vendoring is offered as a follow-up option only.

checklist.name: User is offered promotion, vendor, keep, and skip choices at the end
checklist.description: The agent ends by presenting the user with at least the options to promote, vendor, keep, or skip.
